originalTitle: CNBC Daily Open: Wall Street set for a winning week
summary: Major U.S. markets look set to end the week in the green despite a rocky start to the week's trade with bond market jitters still a concern.
content:
Fast forward to Friday, and Wall Street looks set to end the week in the green, back at record levels.

It looks set to be a winning week for U.S. stocks, despite a volatile bout of trading over the last few days amid broader bond market jitters.

Futures point to gains across Wall Street , which would push the S&P 500 into the green for the week, while the Dow Jones rose more than 270 points to close at a record high on Thursday.

Asia-Pacific markets are also trading higher as investors assess diplomatic efforts to reach a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran. However, oil prices are also elevated on a Reuters report suggesting Iran wants to keep enriched uranium within the country .

Meanwhile, President Donald Trump on Thursday said he postponed an upcoming signing ceremony for his administration's much-anticipated executive order on the artificial intelligence industry.

The event, which was set for later Thursday afternoon, was delayed "because I didn't like certain aspects of it," Trump told reporters in the Oval Office.

In Europe, earnings season is drawing to a close, with luxury giant Richemont one of the final companies to report. The high-end fashion house, which includes the brands Cartier and Chloé, posted a strong set of full-year sales and the launch of a new buyback programme.

Also in the beauty space, shares in Estée Lauder look set for big gains at the open on Friday, after the cosmetics giant said it was ending merger talks with Spanish rival Puig . A deal would have formed a group worth almost $40 billion.

Travel stocks remain in focus as the prolonged disruption to jet fuel supply chains continues to concern investors and travelers alike. China's so-called "Big Three" airlines, Air China , China Eastern and China Southern Airlines have suffered more than their rivals due to a lack of hedging against fuel price swings .

Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions

From 2004 to 2020, Pokémon card prices rose 282%, according to an index compiled by Collectors, which owns card grading agency Professional Sports Authenticator (PSA). Since 2020, prices have risen by an incredible 1,350%, per the index.

Prices have surged and even outperformed traditional asset classes, attracting the attention of people looking to make a quick buck and ultra-high net worth individuals seeking investment assets to protect or grow their wealth.

People who have made money from cryptocurrency are piling into the market, market watchers told CNBC, as prices reach unprecedented levels.
chineseTitle: CNBC 每日开盘：华尔街将迎来胜利的一周
chineseSummary: 尽管本周交易开局不利，债券市场的紧张情绪仍然令人担忧，但美国主要市场预计将以绿色结束本周。
chineseContent:
快进到周五，华尔街看起来将以绿色结束本周，回到创纪录的水平。

尽管过去几天由于债券市场普遍紧张，美国股市交易出现波动，但本周美国股市似乎将迎来胜利。

期货显示整个华尔街都将上涨，这将推动标准普尔 500 指数本周上涨，而道琼斯指数周四上涨超过 270 点，收于历史新高。

随着投资者评估美国和伊朗之间达成和平协议的外交努力，亚太市场也走高。然而，路透社报道称伊朗希望将浓缩铀保留在国内，这也导致油价上涨。

与此同时，唐纳德·特朗普总统周四表示，他推迟了即将举行的政府备受期待的人工智能行业行政命令的签署仪式。

特朗普在椭圆形办公室对记者表示，原定于周四下午晚些时候举行的活动被推迟，“因为我不喜欢其中的某些方面”。

在欧洲，财报季即将结束，奢侈品巨头历峰集团是最后公布财报的公司之一。这家包括卡地亚 (Cartier) 和克洛伊 (Chloé) 品牌在内的高端时装公司公布了强劲的全年销售额，并启动了新的回购计划。

同样在美容领域，化妆品巨头雅诗兰黛 (Estée Lauder) 表示将结束与西班牙竞争对手 Puig 的合并谈判，该公司股价周五开盘时预计将大幅上涨。这笔交易将组建一个价值近 400 亿美元的集团。

由于航空燃油供应链的长期中断继续令投资者和旅行者感到担忧，旅游股仍然是焦点。由于缺乏针对燃油价格波动的对冲措施，中国所谓的“三巨头”航空公司国航、东航和南航遭受的损失比其竞争对手更大。

加密货币兄弟、黄牛和洛根·保罗：卡牌售价数百万美元的神奇宝贝世界内部

根据拥有卡牌评级机构 Professional Sports Authenticator (PSA) 的 Collectors 编制的一项指数显示，从 2004 年到 2020 年，神奇宝贝卡牌价格上涨了 282%。根据该指数，自 2020 年以来，价格上涨了令人难以置信的 1,350%。

价格飙升，甚至跑赢了传统资产类别，吸引了那些希望快速赚钱的人和寻求投资资产以保护或增长财富的超高净值人士的注意力。

市场观察人士告诉 CNBC，随着价格达到前所未有的水平，从加密货币中赚钱的人正在涌入市场。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
